{{CargoRelic
|name=Mead of Poem
|class_id=22562
|rank=AAA
|affct=FAITH
|birthday=04-12
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.06%)
|description=On Apr 12, 20000 BC, Odin took the Mead of Poem from the hands of the frost giant Suttungr.<br>Out of intense jealousy, two dark dwarves killed Kvasir, a creature born from the spittle of the gods, and used its blood to make an incredible elixir, the Mead of Poem, which can turn its drinker into a great poet. However, due to their arrogance, this secret treasure was eventually stolen by a frost giant. Upon learning of this, Odin personally intervened and, relying on his extraordinary wisdom, retrieved the Mead of Poem and brought it back to Asgard, where the gods could enjoy it.
|fame=41
|art=47
|fth=75
|civ=34
|tech=46
|ss1=When you receive Orange Spores from Catalysis:<br>> Gain +1 Spore Voucher by +6%<br>Angel Minion DEF +3%
|ss2=When you receive Orange Spores from Catalysis:<br>> Gain +1 Spore Voucher by +8%<br>Angel Minion DEF +4%
|ss3=When you receive Orange Spores from Catalysis:<br>> Gain +1 Spore Voucher by +10%<br>Angel Minion DEF +5%
|ss4=When you receive Orange Spores from Catalysis:<br>> Gain +1 Spore Voucher by +14%<br>Angel Minion DEF +7%
|ss5=When you receive Orange Spores from Catalysis:<br>> Gain +1 Spore Voucher by +18%<br>Angel Minion DEF +9%
|ss7=When you receive Orange Spores from Catalysis:<br>> Gain +1 Spore Voucher by +18%<br>Angel Minion DEF +9%<br>When you receive Orange Spores from Catalysis:<br>> Gain +1 Spore Voucher by +14% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Prairiesanctum skill II.png|50px]]Place in Prairie Sanctum: Prairie Sanctum, Glorium Cap +15%
|skill2=[[File:Prairiesanctum skill II.png|50px]]Place in Prairie Sanctum: This Relic's FTH +10
}}
